ChangeRequest.name: AE Requirements - Compliance with Art.129 CRR - (CVRD_BND_CRR_129) and Primary asset class of cover pool (PRMRY_ASST_CLSS_CVR_PL)
ChangeRequest.comment:
According to AE Instructions, the variable Compliance with Art.129 CRR can assume the values YES or NO. If YES, then it is required to report the Primary asset class of cover pool. It is required in template F 35.00.c. For a more detailed description:
![image](/uploads/791dbd9e765c93c1e3f64a438d4b0556/image.png)
Currently, in the LDM, the attribute 'Asset class according to CRR_Article 129' of the entity _Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme)_, describes the primary asset class of the cover pool, with a domain corresponding to the categories {a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h} as described in the instructions; this implies the assumption that Compliance with Art.129 CRR = YES. The new requirement is to cover in the LDM also the case Compliance with Art.129 CRR = NO.
For clarity, please find an extract from the model below: ![image](/uploads/997958cff4b46ceb646f2b9522ffa762/image.png)
